questions.question_text: A dealer sells a product at $15\%$ profit. If he had bought it at $10\%$ less and sold it for $₹126$ less, he would have gained $20\%$. Find the cost price.
Three numbers are in the ratio $4:13:9$, and their LCM is $6084$. Their HCF is:
The present age of a man is $4$ years more than twice the present age of his son. After $6$ years, the sum of their ages will be $58$ years. What is the present age of the son?
What sum (in $₹$) will earn a simple interest of $₹1,320$ in $3$ years at $20\%$ per year rate of interest?
If a triangle has sides $a, b, c$, and fixed sum $a+b+c=18$, then the maximum possible area (in $cm^{2}$) of the triangle is

A fruit seller sells mangoes at $₹600$ per box last month. This month, he first increased the price by $10\%$ due to transportation cost and then offered a discount of $15\%$ on the increased price. What is the final price of one box of mangoes?
A train of length $180$ meters is running at a speed of $72 \text{ km/h}$. How much time will it take to cross a bridge $350$ meters long?
The sum of two positive numbers is $27$ and their product is $170$. The positive difference between them is:
A streaming service charges $₹450$ per month. If you buy an annual plan ($12$ months) with a $33\%$ discount, what is your total savings (in $₹$) compared to paying monthly for a year?
If the interest on a sum of $₹y$ at $10\%$ per annum compounded annually for $2$ years is $₹562$, then the total amount payable at the end of the two-year period will be ____.
Find the diameter of a sphere of surface area $28962 \text{ cm}^{2}$, (round off to the closest integer) (Use $\pi = \frac{22}{7}$)
The value of a machine depreciates by $10\%$ every year. What is the total percentage depreciation after $2$ years?

A shopkeeper offers the following schemes on toys of the same marked price.
(A) Successive discounts of $15\%$ and $20\%$ on any number of toys bought.
(B) Successive discounts of $8\%$, $24\%$ and $37\%$ on any number of toys bought.
(C) $3$ toys free on the first $5$ toys, and $2$ toys free on each $10$ toys thereafter.
(D) $4$ toys free of cost on buying $10$ toys.
Which of the above schemes is the least beneficial to him?

Pipes X, Y, and Z together can fill a tank in $8$ hours. If all three work together for $3$ hours, and then pipe Z is closed, the remaining tank is filled by X and Y in $10$ hours. In how many hours can pipe Z alone fill the empty tank?

Two bells are rung at intervals of $1,764$ seconds and $2,268$ seconds, respectively. They are rung together at the start. After how much time will the two bells ring together again for the first time?

Two taps can fill a cistern in $2$ hours and $37$ hours, respectively. A third tap can empty it in $1.5$ hours. How long (in hours) will it take to fill half of the empty cistern if all the taps are opened together?
The ratio of two numbers is $3:5$. If $6$ is subtracted from each, the resulting numbers are in the ratio $1:2$. Find the difference between the two original numbers.
If a two-digit number has a digit sum of $9$ and adding $27$ reverses its digits, determine the unit digit of the number.

Simplify the following expression using the BODMAS rule:
$$\frac{3}{4} + \left( \frac{1}{3} \times \frac{9}{10} \right) - \frac{2}{3}$$
The arithmetic mean of the first $15$ numbers is $12$. The mean is reduced by $6$ when one of the numbers is removed. Find the number that is removed?
The perimeter of a rhombus is $100$ meters and one of its diagonals is $14$ meters long. What is the length of the other diagonal?
Which of the ratios given below is the greatest among them?
If $4\sin\theta + \cos\theta = 4$, $0^{\circ} < \theta < 90^{\circ}$, then the value of $\sin{30^{\circ}} + \cos{30^{\circ}}$ is
In a class, the average score of $8$ boys is $56$ and the average score of $4$ girls is $80$. What is the average score of all $12$ students?
The $7$-digit number $46A484B$ is divisible by $24$. What is the minimum value of $(A + B)$?

Simplify:
$$\left( \frac{12}{33} \div \frac{12}{2} \right) \div \left( \frac{3}{7} \times \frac{14}{9} + \frac{11}{3} \div \frac{2}{25} \text{ of } \frac{8}{25} \right)$$
Sunil purchased a microwave oven for $₹7,000$. He spent $₹400$ on its transportation and $₹600$ on repairs. He sold the oven for $₹9,800$. What is his percentage profit on total investment?

A and B invest in a business in the ratio $5:7$. After $4$ months, C joins the business with an investment equal to B's amount invested by C. At the end of one year, the total profit is $₹62,000$. Find the sum (in $₹$) of the shares of partners B and C.
Which of the following numbers is completely divisible by $6$?
A person walks from point P to Q at $5 \text{ km/hr}$ and returns from Q to P along the same route jogging at $10 \text{ km/hr}$. If the total time is $3$ hours, what is the distance between P and Q?
By which Amendment Act were the words 'socialist', 'secular', and 'integrity' added to the Preamble of the Indian Constitution?
Who presided over the National Level Conclave of Ministers of States/UTs for Minority Welfare held on $13$ September $2023$, at Vandiya Bhawan, New Delhi?
When does the Indian Prime Minister hoist the national flag on the occasion of Independence Day?
In which state of India did Pattachitra paintings originate?

options.text: Increased protection from British officials improved rural living conditions.
Expansion of irrigated farming reduced dependence on religious leaders.
Stable land rights allowed peasants to negotiate with revenue contractors.
Forced taxation and famine pushed dispossessed peasants into rebel groups.

options.text: It is an Application Data File used for temporary user settings and can be safely deleted to free up disk space.
It is a System Driver File that allows the operating system to communicate with a specific hardware component.
It is a System Configuration File that holds graphics settings and can be edited with a standard text editor.
It is an Operating System Log File that records system events and is only read by the Task Manager.

questions.question_text: In the Windows $10$ File system, a file named `mydiary.sys` is found in the C:\Windows\System32 folder. If copied and pasted to the external D:\ location, which of the following best describes the purpose and classification of this file?

options.text: A system where the Company collected revenue, and Nawab handled administration
A system where the French and British shared governance
A system where the Nawab collected revenue and the Company maintained the army
A system where the British ruled directly

questions.question_text: What was the Dual Government system introduced after the Battle of Buxar?
The Mansabdari System, introduced by Akbar in $1571$, was mainly a system of ______.
Which academic institution was responsible for designing the IRIS chip based on the BHARAT operating system, India's push for self-reliance in semiconductor technology, in February $2025$?
Which football player was named the Professional Footballers' Association (PFA) Player of the Year in August $2025$, becoming the first player to win the award three times?

Which wildlife sanctuary is set to host its inaugural female cheetah (Dheera) as part of a breeding/reintroduction initiative in $2025$?

Which statement is True or False about the Windows $11$ Operating System (OS)?
(i) The OS loads program code directly onto the hard disk for execution, as the CPU can only retrieve instructions from primary memory.
(ii) In multitasking, the OS allocates small CPU time slices to processes, rapidly switching between them, a technique known as Time-sharing.
Which of the following indicators is NOT a component of the Human Development Index (HDI)?
Which of the following is a fat-soluble vitamin that helps in promotion of calcium absorption in the gut for bone health?
Which of the following was the first international agreement to establish legally binding emission reduction targets specifically for developed countries?
In which country was the International Conference on 'Reimagining Existence: Emerging Perspectives in World Literature and Language' held in March $2025$?

options.text: Application software loads the operating system; system software performs user tasks
System software manages hardware; application software performs user tasks
System software performs user tasks; application software controls hardware

questions.question_text: Which of the following correctly differentiates system software from application software?
Under which Article of the Indian Constitution may the President of India proclaim President's Rule when constitutional machinery fails in a state?
Which of the following optical properties of light enables sunglasses to reduce glare from sunlight reflected off surfaces such as water or roads?
Which type of natural vegetation covers the largest geographical area in India?

With which country did the United Kingdom (UK) sign the Kensington Treaty, the first treaty between the two countries since the Second World War, in July $2025$?

options.text: Both statements I and II are incorrect.
Statement I is incorrect, while statement II is correct.
Both statements I and II are correct.
Statement I is correct, while statement II is incorrect.

questions.question_text:
Consider the following statements regarding the provincial administration in the Mughal period and select the correct option.
Statement I: Each Suba was placed under a Subedar or provincial governor who was directly appointed by the Emperor.
Statement II: Daroga-i-Dak was responsible for maintaining the communication channel.
Which of the following Union Territories has a Legislative Assembly?
Which Amendment restored the primacy of Fundamental Rights over Directive Principles?
Who among the following led the large-scale armed attack on the Chittagong armoury in April $1930$?

Refer to the following series and answer the question. (Counting to be done from left to right) (all numbers are single-digit numbers only.)
Left $9 \, 1 \, 2 \, 3 \, 6 \, 8 \, 4 \, 3 \, 2 \, 7 \, 3 \, 5 \, 6 \, 1 \, 2 \, 9 \, 8 \, 3 \, 4 \, 6 \, 8 \, 2$ (Right)
How many such even digits are there, each of which is immediately preceded by a perfect square and immediately followed by an one digit? (NOTE: $1$ is also a perfect square.)

Amit starts from Point Y and drives $14 \text{ km}$ towards South. He then turns left and drives $35 \text{ km}$, takes a left and drives $68 \text{ km}$. He then takes a left turn and drives $41 \text{ km}$. He takes a left turn and drives $54 \text{ km}$ to reach Point X. What is the approximate distance (shortest distance) and towards which direction should he drive in order to reach Point Y again? (All turns are $90^{\circ}$ turns only unless specified.)

What should come in place of $?$ in the given series based on the English alphabetical order?
SQU TRV USW VTX $?$
If $1$ is added to each even digit and $2$ is subtracted from each odd digit in the number $6873642$, then what will be the sum of all the even digits in the new number thus formed?
John ranked $18$th from the bottom and $29$th from the top in his class. How many students are there in his class?

What will come in place of the question mark $(?)$ in the following equation if '$+$' and '$ \times $' are interchanged and '$ - $' and '$ \div $' are interchanged?
$60 \div 3 \times 18 + 6 - 5 = ?$
In a certain code language, 'NORM' is coded as '$7341$' and 'ROME' is coded as '$3748$'. What is the code for 'E' in the given code language?

Study the given diagram carefully and answer the question. The numbers in different sections indicate the number of persons working in an organization. (NOTE: You have to take the given data to be true even if it seems to be at variance from commonly known facts.)
How many such employees are there who also speak German?

Each letter in the word LANGUID is arranged in the English alphabetical order. How many letters are there in the English alphabetical order between the letter which is fourth from the left and the one which is fourth from the right in the new letter cluster thus formed?

Seven people, Mayank, Bidhi, Palak, Rakesh, Surya, Tina and Vivek, are sitting in a row, facing north. Only two people sit to the right of Rakesh. Bidhi sits to the immediate left of Vivek and Vivek sits third to the left of Rakesh. Palak sits third to the right of Tina, but she does not sit at any extreme ends. Mayank is not an immediate neighbour of Vivek. How many people sit between Tina and Vivek?
AEHB is related to FJMG in a certain way based on the English alphabetical order. In the same way, DKIE is related to IMPJ. To which of the following is GKNH related, following the same logic?

Based on the English alphabetical order, three of the following four letter-cluster pairs are alike in a certain way and thus form a group. Which is the one that does not belong to that group? (Note: The odd one out is not based on the number of consonants/vowels or their position in the letter cluster.)

Seven boxes A, B, C, D, E, F and G are kept one over the other but not necessarily in the same order. A is kept second from the bottom. Only three boxes are kept between A and E. G is kept at one of the positions below E. Only three boxes are kept between C and B. D is kept at one of the positions above G. How many boxes are kept between B and E?

Read the given statements and conclusions carefully. You have to take the given statements to be true even if they seem to be at variance from commonly known facts. You have to decide which conclusions logically follow from the given statements.
Statements: All cakes are biscuits. All pizzas are biscuits.
Conclusion (I): Some cakes are pizzas.
Conclusion (II): Some biscuits are pizzas

In a certain code language,
$A + B$ means '$A$ is the son of $B$'.
$A \times B$ means '$A$ is the mother of $B$'.
$A - B$ means '$A$ is the wife of $B$'.
$A \div B$ means '$A$ is the father of $B$'.
Based on the above, how is S related to K if 'S + D $\div$ F $\times$ H – K'?

(Note: The odd one out is not based on the number of consonants/vowels or their position in the letter cluster.)

How many letters will appear exactly twice in the new group of letters thus formed?

R, S, E, A, D, I, N and G are sitting around a circular table, facing the centre of the table. Only two people sit between N and R when counted from the left of R. G sits third to the left of D. I sits to the immediate right of A. D sits second to the left of N. I is not an immediate neighbour of G.
What is third to the right of E?

If '$+$' means '$\times$', '$\times$' means '$ + $', '$\div$' means '$-$', and '$-$ ' means '$ \div $', then what will come in place of the question mark $(?)$ in the following equation?
$92 - 8 + 311 \div 715 \times 11 = ?$

Select the set in which the numbers are related in the same way as are the numbers of the following sets.
(NOTE: Operations should be performed on the whole numbers, without breaking down the numbers into its constituent digits, e.g., $13$ - Operations on $13$ such as adding/subtracting/multiplying etc. can be performed. Breaking down $13$ into $1$ and $3$ and then performing mathematical operations on $1$ and $3$ is not allowed.)
$8 \, 2 \, 20$
$9 \, 4 \, 30$
